title: Full Stack PHP Developer (Sunucu & Mail Altyapısı Yetkinliği ile
description: Ekibimize, web projelerini uçtan uca sahiplenebilecek bir Full Stack PHP Developer arıyoruz. Bu rol yalnızca kod yazmayı değil, geliştirdiği projeyi sunucuya taşımayı, DNS ve mail yapılandırmalarını kurmayı ve sonrasında bakımını sürdürmeyi kapsıyor. Süreç bir bütün olarak ilerlediği için, tüm halkalarına hakim olabilecek bir profil hedefliyoruz: Siteyi geliştir › sunucuya deploy et › DNS/mail ayarlarını yap › bakımını üstlen Aranan Nitelikler PHP ile en az 3 yıl profesyonel deneyim- WordPress / WooCommerce üzerinde geliştirme ve bakım tecrübesi- MySQL/MariaDB, veritabanı optimizasyonu- Frontend tarafında HTML/CSS/JavaScript ile çalışabilme Linux sunucu yönetimi (WHM/cPanel, Nginx/Apache, PHP-FPM/LiteSpeed)- DNS yönetimi: A, MX, CNAME, TXT, SPF, DKIM, DMARC kayıtları Kurumsal mail çözümleri deneyimi: Google Workspace, Microsoft 365 / Outlook, Yandex 360 kurulumu, domain doğrulama, kullanıcı ve grup yönetimi Mail sunucusu kurulumu, migrasyon (IMAP taşıma) ve sorun giderme; teslim edilebilirlik (deliverability) konularına hakimiyet SSL sertifikaları, Git ile versiyon kontrolü Deployment süreçlerine hakimiyet Başvuru: posta@mag-net.com.tr 0532 241 25 50

title: Software Engineer - Backend (Remote)
description: Role : Backend Engineer Location : Remote (Work from Anywhere) Job Type: Contract Payout : $20 - $70/hour Role Overview: We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Backend Engineer to work on a contract basis. The role involves building and maintaining scalable backend systems to support high-performance applications. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to implement efficient APIs and data pipelines. Key Responsibilities: • Design, develop, and deploy robust backend services using modern frameworks and tools. • Optimize system performance, scalability, and reliability for global users. • Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code following best practices. • Debug and resolve issues in production environments with a focus on uptime. • Participate in code reviews and contribute to architectural decisions. Required Skills & Qualifications: • Proficiency in backend programming languages such as Python, Java, or Go. • Experience with RESTful and GraphQL API development and integration. • Strong understanding of databases (SQL and NoSQL) and query optimization. • Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes). • Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines and version control systems like Git. More About the Opportunity: This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the Software Development | Technology, Information and Internet | IT Services and IT Consulting | Information Services industry, contributing to the development of high-impact backend systems. The contract includes flexibility to work across time zones and deliver solutions that scale globally. Equal Opportunity Employer: We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications. Apply Now!

title: Senior Backend Engineer – Architecture Team
description: About Us ColendiBank is Türkiye's first AI-powered digital native universal deposit bank, pioneering the integration of advanced technology with accessible financial services. Officially launched in 2024 following the acquisition of a coveted digital banking license, the bank caters to individuals and SMEs with a focus on micro credit and innovative deposit services. As a fully digital institution, ColendiBank leverages a cutting-edge, scalable core banking platform to deliver seamless, secure, and user-friendly experiences. Its commitment to innovation positions it as a leader in redefining digital banking in Türkiye. Job Description We are seeking an experienced Senior Backend Engineer – Architecture Team responsible for designing and developing scalable, secure backend services that support digital banking platforms. The role encompasses backend development, system integration, architectural contribution, technical leadership, and collaboration with cross-functional teams to deliver resilient and high-quality solutions. Key Responsibilities Work as part of a central Architecture team: provide hands-on technical support to product development teams, take on tasks from their backlogs when needed, and act as a technical reference point across the organization, collaborating closely with product, QA, compliance, and operations teams Design and develop backend services across the bank's digital banking stack — scalable RESTful APIs, microservices, API gateways, and integration/adapter services supporting digital banking journeys Integrate banking services with digital channels, core banking systems, and third-party platforms such as digital onboarding / identity verification (KYC) and real-time customer engagement & campaign management systems Contribute to pragmatic architectural decisions, balancing real-world trade-offs; help define and uphold engineering standards and drive the modernization of existing services toward modern Java, event-driven, and cloud-native architectures Ensure data consistency, security, confidentiality, traceability, and auditability across distributed systems, including reliable validation, exception management, and retry flows Write clean, maintainable, and testable code, and continuously improve systems with a focus on observability, resiliency, and operational excellence Support and mentor other engineers through technical guidance, feedback, and knowledge sharing Leverage modern tools, including AI-assisted development, to improve productivity while maintaining high quality standards What We're Looking For 5+ years of hands-on backend development experience, preferably in banking or fintech Advanced proficiency in Java and the Spring ecosystem (Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, etc.) Deep understanding of distributed systems, microservices, and event-driven architectures (e.g., Kafka), with a strong grasp of object-oriented design and clean architecture principles Proven experience with both relational (PostgreSQL, Oracle, SQL Server) and NoSQL (MongoDB, Redis, etc.) databases, and the judgment to choose the right storage technology per use case Hands-on experience with containerized deployments (Docker, Kubernetes), cloud-native architectures, and CI/CD pipelines — preferably with GitLab Strong understanding of unit, integration, and contract testing; you write testable, maintainable code by default Solid understanding of monitoring, alerting, and observability practices in production systems Experience with secure coding practices and handling sensitive financial data A mindset of ownership and accountability; comfort operating in high-ambiguity environments, turning unclear problems into concrete solutions, and communicating decisions clearly across stakeholders Ability to effectively use AI tools as a productivity multiplier, while maintaining engineering rigor Pluses: core banking experience; integrations with external platforms (identity verification / KYC, campaign management, fraud, digital signature); comfort navigating codebases in unfamiliar languages and stacks Join Us At ColendiBank, you’ll play a key role in redefining the retail banking experience. We offer opportunities for professional growth in a collaborative, inclusive environment, contributing to a pioneering journey in the digital banking landscape. Become a core part of our journey. Join ColendiBank as we build the future of digital banking. ColendiBank is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.

title: Full Stack Developer (VueJs, Nuxt.js & C#)
description: Yüksek trafikli sistemlerimizde uçtan uca mimari sorumluluk alacak, kod kalitesini standartların üzerine taşıyacak ve ölçeklenebilir mikro servis ekosistemimize liderlik edecek bir Full Stack Developer arıyoruz. Konum: Konya Çalışma Şekli: Tam Zamanlı / Uzaktan (Sadece Konya bölgesinde ikamet eden adaylar değerlendirmeye alınacaktır.) Sorumluluklar: Event-driven mimariye uygun, yüksek performanslı Node.js servisleri tasarlamak ve implemente etmek Vue.js 3 ve TypeScript kullanarak, reusable komponent kütüphaneleri ve performans odaklı ön yüzler geliştirmek Firebase ve PostgreSQL veritabanı katmanlarında query optimizasyonu ve veri modellemesi yapmak Aradığımız Özellikler: Node.js runtime ve asenkron programlama konusunda derinlemesine uzmanlık Modern frontend ekosistemine (State management, Composition API, SSR) hakimiyet Docker, Kubernetes ve CI/CD süreçlerinde aktif tecrübe Vue.js ve Nuxt.js konusunda uzmanlık .Net teknolojisi C# ta yazılım geliştirmiş MS SQL ile çalışmış Tercihen: Micro Servis mimarisi ve Docker/Kubernetes konteyerizasyon süreçlerinde deneyim Birim test (Unit Test) ve entegrasyon testleri (Jest, Cypress) yazma disiplinine sahip olmak Teknik literatürü takip edebilecek seviyede İngilizce bilgisi Açık kaynak projelere katkı sağlamış olmak veya aktif bir GitHub portfolyosu Agile ve Scrum metodolojilerine aşinalık Clean Code konseptlerinin uygulanması ve kaynak kod iyileştirme/refactoring konusunda uzmanlık Bootstrap, HTML ve CSS deneyimi Ne Sağlıyoruz? Aylık Yemek Ücreti Hızla büyüyen bir e-ticaret ekibinde çalışma fırsatı Yetkinlik ve performansa bağlı kariyer gelişimi Dinamik ve genç ekip ortamı

title: Backend Developer-Banking Applications (Loan/Treasury)
description: Join the Minds Behind the Future of Tech! At Mobven, we are committed to building high-quality digital products that transform industries. Founded in 2012, we evolved from a promising startup into an award-winning technology company, recognized by Deloitte as one of the EMEA region’s fastest-growing tech firms—four years in a row. Our expertise in mobile technology and digital transformation has made us a trusted partner for global enterprises. We are looking for individuals who take pride in their craft, push their work to the highest standards, and thrive in a culture of excellence. If you are someone who values expertise, precision, and innovation and is eager to contribute to groundbreaking digital solutions that shape the future of technology, join us at Mobven. Be part of a team where your skills, dedication, and passion will be recognized, challenged, and elevated to new height Key Responsibilities Design, develop, document, test, and debug new and existing software systems. Engage in the full software development lifecycle, including requirements analysis, design, implementation, testing, and deployment. Develop RESTful APIs using WebAPI frameworks. Required Skills and Experience : 6+ years of experience in .NET development using C#.Hands-on experience with both SQL and NoSQL databases, PostgreSQL, and ElasticSearch.Proficiency in RabbitMQ and Redis. Experience with BOA and WPF.Experience with source control systems such as TFS, GitHub, or similar tools. Familiarity with unit testing and integration testing methodologies. Knowledge of software engineering best practices for the entire software development lifecycle. Solid understanding of Windows and Linux environments.Knowledge of web services, including RESTful architecture, JSON, SOAP, and XML, and their use in system integration. Strong problem-solving abilities paired with excellent communication and collaboration skills.A strong passion for learning and adopting new technologies. What We O ffer: Health Insurance Mealcard Transport Allowance Training Budget GiftCard BirthdayLeave Happy Hour

title: Game Backend Developer (Golang)
description: We are looking for a Game Backend Developer (Golang) Responsibilities: Architect, design, test, and implement features in our core backend services. Develop large-scale backend systems for our mobile games. Build and enhance tools that support our game development pipeline. Write clean, well-structured code. Create flexible and scalable solutions to adapt to evolving game requirements. Requirements: Strong understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles and familiarity with Design Patterns. Minimum of 2 years of experience in backend development. Strong knowledge in Go Programming language. Knowledge in NoSQL, Relational(MySQL, PostgreSQL, etc.), and in-memory databases. Experience on high traffic services. Experience in the gaming industry. A passion for games and enthusiasm for solving technical challenges in game development. Strong appreciation for teamwork and effective collaboration.

title: Data Engineer, Backend Systems
description: Company Canaria is a technology startup providing high-quality, large-scale labor market data to the B2B market. Our mission is to power the next generation of solutions in recruitment, HR analytics, workforce planning, lead generation, healthcare, academic research, and finance by delivering the most comprehensive and accurate job market data available. Our advanced data mining, computing optimizations, and state-of-the-art NLP techniques let us process job market data at scale: over 1 billion unique job postings drawn from 200,000+ data sources, with 100+ fields per record. Our clients use this data to understand market trends, identify skill gaps, and connect people with the right opportunities. What You Will Do Own the design and implementation of robust data pipelines that form the backbone of our product. Design and operate the databases behind that product, across relational and non-relational models. Build and deploy scalable, cloud-native and serverless services on our cloud platform. Use containerization (Docker, and Kubernetes where it fits) to streamline deployment and operations. Ensure system quality through stress, integration, and end-to-end testing. Write clean, maintainable, well-documented code. Collaborate with engineers, data scientists, and product managers. Who You Are (Required) 3+ years building production backend or data-intensive systems. Bachelor's in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience. Highly proficient in Python and comfortable in a Unix environment (scripting and application development). Solid experience with at least one relational database (e.g. PostgreSQL) and at least one NoSQL store (e.g. MongoDB or Redis). Hands-on experience with at least one major cloud platform (AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure). Comfortable containerizing and deploying applications with Docker. Nice to Have Experience designing scalable back-end systems for data-intensive workloads. Kubernetes in production. Aerospike or other high-throughput key-value stores. RESTful API design and optimization. CI/CD pipelines and automated testing frameworks. Monitoring and logging tools (e.g. Prometheus, Grafana). Big data warehouses (BigQuery, Redshift). Asynchronous programming in Python. Web scraping (Scrapy) and browser automation (Playwright). Benefits High-end laptop. Annual performance bonus. Work with global teams (US, EU). Founders and colleagues with FAANG and top-institution backgrounds. Access to powerful on-prem and cloud compute for research. Professional development and growth opportunities. Hiring Process First call about the role & expectations (15 mins) Basic Python coding interview (1 hour) Technical interview (1 hour)

title: Long-Term Full Stack Developer Intern
description: We build AI-powered systems processing large-scale legal data. We are looking for a long-term intern to take on real responsibilities, with the potential to join us full-time. What You Will Do Develop modern UIs with React and backend APIs with Node.js Write web crawlers (Python) and process data pipelines (Kafka) Manage search/indexing (Elasticsearch) and graph databases (Neo4j) Integrate Model Context Protocol (MCP) Requirements 3rd or 4th-year CS/SE student available at least 3 days a week Basic coding skills in JS/TS or Python, and Git Eager to learn (you don't need to know the entire stack yet) AI Literacy: We actively use Claude, Cursor, etc. You must be able to read, understand, and guide AI-generated code What We Offer A direct path to a full-time position Hands-on experience with Kafka, Elasticsearch, Neo4j, and MCP Close mentorship, code reviews, and an AI-driven engineering culture

title: .NET Full Stack Developer
description: About the Job Company Description OBSS is Turkey’s largest technology consultancy, pioneering product development and technology consulting for an AI-native future. With more than 20 years of experience and offices in Istanbul, Ankara, London, Amsterdam, and Baku, we empower leading companies in banking and finance, insurance, e-commerce, retail, and the start-up ecosystem. Our team of over 1000 talented professionals thrives on collaboration, innovation, and continuous learning. We are now looking for a .NET Full Stack Developer to join us and contribute to building high-quality, end-to-end solutions that create real business impact. OBSS is looking for a .NET Full Stack Developer to join our dynamic team and contribute to delivering end-to-end software payment solutions across diverse industries. You will work on cutting-edge projects, collaborating with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and maintain high-quality applications that solve real business problems. Main Responsibilities Collaborate with business analysts, project managers, and other stakeholders to understand and define project requirements. Design, develop, and maintain .NET-based applications, ensuring scalability, performance, and security. Participate in the full software development life cycle, including planning, coding, testing, and deployment. Conduct code reviews and provide constructive feedback to ensure code quality and adherence to coding standards. Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and issues in a timely manner. Stay current with industry trends and best practices to continuously improve development processes and technologies. Qualifications / Technical Skills Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, Software Engineering, or any relevant field. Strong experience with .NET Core, C#, MVC, WebAPI, Entity Framework, and SQL Knowledge of Angular Knowledge of Kubernetes, MSSQL, Redis, and cloud platforms (GCP preferred) Experience with test automation Eager to learn new technologies Good team player with a result-oriented attitude and analytical mindset Strong communication and interpersonal skills High energy and drive Ability to approach AI with curiosity and intention, actively incorporating AI-powered tools into workflows to enhance productivity and drive innovation. Additional Informations : Professional Growth & Learning As a tech company, we focus on reskilling and upskilling to support career growth. We offer a personalized Individual Growth Program (IGP), where employees set clear goals for each half of the year. These goals may include trainings, certifications, and personal development milestones, creating a structured roadmap for continuous improvement. The IGP helps employees strengthen both technical and soft skills, ensuring steady professional advancement. Company Culture and Values We celebrate diversity, inclusion, and equal opportunity, fostering a collaborative environment where innovation can flourish. Our culture emphasizes mentorship, knowledge sharing, and active participation in tech communities, workshops, and team events. This vibrant atmosphere empowers employees to contribute their best while feeling supported and valued. Benefits and Perks We provide competitive salaries, flexible and hybrid working arrangements, and a wide range of opportunities for growth through training programs, certifications, and workshops. In addition, we offer initiatives designed to build a supportive and engaging workplace where curiosity and collaboration are encouraged. These benefits ensure that employees feel motivated, empowered, and equipped to reach their full potential.
